author: Marko K.
review: Najbolji ćevapi u Zagrebu! Svaki put kad dodjem, uvijek je isto ukusno.
reviewEn: The best cevapi in Zagreb! Every time I come, it's always equally delicious.

author: Ana B.
review: Odličan burger! Original Žarulja cheeseburger je nešto posebno.
reviewEn: Great burger! Original Žarulja cheeseburger is something special.

author: Josip M.
review: Vinski gulaš je fantastičan, a cijene su više nego pristupačne.
reviewEn: Wine goulash is fantastic, and the prices are more than affordable.

author: Sara L.
review: Ugodna atmosfera i ljubazno osoblje. Preporučujem svima!
reviewEn: Pleasant atmosphere and friendly staff. I recommend it to everyone!

author: Tomislav H.
review: Najbolji roštilj u gradu! Svaki put kad poželim dobar gablec, dodjem ovdje.
reviewEn: The best grill in town! Every time I want a good grilled meal, I come here.
